Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

WITH CleanedProductCatalogVariant AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

WHERE EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE IS NOT NULL

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

RankedVariantBadge AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(vpb.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(vpb.__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY,

pcv.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

vpb.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_ACTIVE AS VARIANT_BADGE_ACTIVE_FLAG,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE AS VARIANT_BADGE_CODE_BK,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_DESCRIPTION_EN AS VARIANT_BADGE_DESCRIPTION,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_NAME_EN AS VARIANT_BADGE_NAME,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_OFFLINEDATE AS VARIANT_OFFLINE_DATE,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_ONLINEDATE AS VARIANT_ONLINE_DATE,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

vpb.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE,

vpb.__LOAD_TS

ORDER BY vpb.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM

DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGES vpb

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalogVariant pcv

ON vpb.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND vpb.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

)

SELECT *

FROM RankedVariantBadge

WHERE row_priority = 1

;

 

 

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_PRODUCTAVAILABLEBADGES_BADGE_CODE, __LOAD_TS

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2 (

);

alter table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_PRODUCT_AVAILABLE_BADGE2 set comment = 'Reference data entity defining variant-level badges, including codes, descriptions, validity dates, and activation flags to enable merchandising differentiation at the variant level.';
